Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Determining Issue Of Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar Jun-20-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Caroline Scalla, Esq. 714-884-4136 of Ross Wersching & Woolcoot LLP for Plaintiff ABM Industry Group through Court Call.
No Other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BRE MARKET STREET PROPERTY OWNER LLC, EQUITY OFFICE MANAGEMENT L.L.C.'S Motion For Order Determining Issue Of Good Faith Settlement.

Defendants BRE Market Street Property Owner LLC and Equity Office Management, LLC's motion for determination that their settlement with plaintiff ABM Industry Groups, LLC was made in good faith is granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
